quartile of selected Hospital Acquired Conditions (HAC). 

SHORT NAME: IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_6_AMT 

LONG NAME: IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_6_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_6_AMT) that is present on any of the claim 
records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of the claim HAC reduction payment amounts reported on the 
claims that comprise the stay). 

This field is new in October 2014. This field only applies to Inpatient
